name: feature-pipeline
description: Multi-agent PM -> Business Analyst -> Architect -> Developer pipeline for feature development. Orchestrates four specialized agents in sequence with Q&A loops between stages.

interface.shortDescription: Run a PM, analyst, architect, and developer feature workflow.
interface.longDescription: Feature Pipeline orchestrates a four-stage feature development workflow. It creates product, functional, architecture, and implementation documents, with bounded clarification loops between stages before implementation.
defaultPrompt: Run the feature pipeline for this feature.
Build this feature with PM and analyst stages.
Use the agent pipeline to implement this change.
